rows.label: tev078101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Atheron about the food situation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Atheron if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_MSG0001
rows.name:
My people live by devoltanizing what your
people consider to be toxins. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Consuming anything other than
that—your "pizza," for example—would
be life-threatening to us. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_MSG0003
rows.name:
So this integrated production plant of
yours is not able to create the things
that we need to survive. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_MSG0004
rows.name:
We require chemicals such as the sort
that are produced as byproducts from
human weapons manufacturing. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_MSG0005
rows.name:
Fortunately, you humans seem to be especially adept at
creating such things. *fsssh* So I believe we will be
able to carve out a life for ourselves in this city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_MSG0008
rows.name:
*fsssh* While walking through the back alleys, I
encountered a creature coated in sticky black fluid
that was coming from the opposite direction.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_MSG0009
rows.name:
It turned out to be Nokocche,
who was drenched in voltant
for some reason. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_MSG0010
rows.name:
The encounter was quite a shock to me.
*fsssh* I quickly heeded my overpowering
urge to devoltanize her with all speed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_MSG0011
rows.name:
The experience left me with a strange affection for
her, and we've been together ever since. *fsssh* But
I still don't understand what happened to her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Atheron about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_MSG0016
rows.name:
As long as I have voltant to devoltanize, I'm
happy. I've never had any reason to regret not
being able to eat your human food before. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_MSG0017
rows.name:
But lately, watching Nokocche happily
devour her pizza has left me with an
urge to try it myself. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_MSG0018
rows.name:
*fsssh* I know that doing so could be
life-threatening, and I certainly don't
want to put anyone through that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_MSG0019
rows.name:
But it would be nice if the folks at Army
Pizza would develop some sort of voltant
pizza that my people could eat. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_MSG0012
rows.name:
Nokocche has promised to take me on a tour
of the garbage dumps of NLA. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_MSG0013
rows.name:
I am quite excited. I hope that
they're absolutely crawling with
mold and bacteria! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_MSG0014
rows.name:
It feels as though every day has
been more fun than the last since
we arrived in this city. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078101_MSG0015
rows.name:
Many of my kind wish to return to our
homeworld, but I hope to continue my life
with Nokocche here for a while longer! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]
